channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WIPRO] Wipro Launches GIFT City Hub to Accelerate AI-Powered BFSI Transformation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Wipro Limited, a leading AI-powered technology services and consulting company, has launched a new hub at the Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City), Gandhinagar. The hub is aimed at strengthening Wipro’s capabilities to deliver advanced technology services to global Banking, Financial Services, and Insurance (BSFI) clients. The new hub will support the delivery of advanced solutions across areas such as digital banking and capital markets, along with regulatory technology, risk and compliance, and core platform modernization initiatives.

  • Wipro's new center in GIFT city reflects Gujarat's growing prominence as a destination for innovation and high value digital capabilities.
  • The hub will offer 150 ready-to-deploy seats, with the flexibility to scale up to 500 seats based on client demand.
  • Wipro is well positioned to meet current industry needs, while building capabilities aligned to the next phase of industry transformation.
  • The new hub will support the delivery of advanced solutions across areas such as digital banking and capital markets, along with regulatory technology, risk and compliance, and core platform modernization initiatives.
  • Wipro's presence at GIFT City is a strategic investment to scale the impact of Wipro Intelligence™ for the global BFSI industry.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WIPRO LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [JBCHEPHARM] JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd Receives Order from State Tax Officer, Tamil Nadu - Imposed Penalty of INR 80,81,126/-
item.description:
JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd has received an order from the State Tax Officer, Intelligence, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, imposing a penalty of INR 80,81,126/-. The order was received on 18-03-2026 at 7.23 pm and alleges reversal of tax liability for the period Apr-19 to Mar-20. The company will file an appeal and expects a favorable outcome at the appellate level. The company does not reasonably expect the order to have any material financial impact.

  • JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd received an order from the State Tax Officer, Tamil Nadu
  • Order imposes a penalty of INR 80,81,126/-
  • Order alleges reversal of tax liability for the period Apr-19 to Mar-20
  • Company to file an appeal
  • Company hopes for a favorable outcome at the appellate level

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: J.B.CHEMICALS & PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SJVN] SJVN Achieves 1 Billion Units Generation Milestone at 1,000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SJVN Limited has achieved a significant milestone with its 1000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project by successfully generating 1 Billion Units (BU) of energy on March 20, 2026. The project is located in Bikaner district of Rajasthan and is being implemented through its wholly owned subsidiary, STIVN Green Energy Limited (SGEL). It has been developed under the Central Public Sector Undertaking (CPSU) Scheme — Phase II, Tranche III of the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE), Government of India. The project achieved its Commercial Operation Date (COD) on December 24, 2025, and is expected to generate approximately 2,454.55 million units (MU) of electricity in its first year and about 56 billion units cumulatively over 25 years. The tariff for the project has been competitively fixed at X2.57 per unit, ensuring affordable green power. The generated electricity will be supplied to the states of Rajasthan, Jammu & Kashmir, and Uttarakhand.

  • SJVN achieves 1 billion units generation milestone at 1,000 MW Bikaner Solar Power Project
  • Project located in Bikaner district of Rajasthan and implemented by STIVN Green Energy Limited
  • Developed under Central Public Sector Undertaking Scheme of MNRE, Government of India
  • Expected to generate 56 billion units of electricity over 25 years
  • Tariff for the project fixed at X2.57 per unit

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SJVN Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts Ltd Opens New Store in Ambala, Haryana
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avenue Supermarts Ltd, the company behind the popular retail chain D-Mart, has announced the opening of a new store at Urban Village, Ambala in Haryana. This brings the total number of stores to 464.

  • Avenue Supermarts Ltd has expanded its retail presence with a new store in Ambala, Haryana
  • The new store is located at Urban Village
  • This brings the total number of stores to 464

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PADAMCO] Bon Lon Pvt Ltd Acquires 6.83% Stake in Padam Cotton Yarns Ltd Through Rights Issue
item.description:
Bon Lon Pvt Ltd has acquired 6.83% stake in Padam Cotton Yarns Ltd through a rights issue. The total shares acquired by Bon Lon Pvt Ltd are 11,50,00,000, which were acquired on 18th March 2026. This acquisition does not involve any encumbrance or warrants. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is 21,94,70,000/-.

  • Bon Lon Pvt Ltd acquires 6.83% stake in Padam Cotton Yarns Ltd
  • Acquisition through a rights issue
  • Total shares acquired: 11,50,00,000
  • No encumbrance or warrants involved
  • Total diluted share/voting capital after acquisition: 21,94,70,000/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PADAM COTTON YARNS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GLOTTIS] Glottis Limited Approves Incorporation and Investment in Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Malaysia
item.description:
Glottis Limited has informed the Exchange about the incorporation and investment in a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WoS) in Malaysia. The decision was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on 19-03-2026. The primary objective of this incorporation is to expand the Company’s operational reach and enhance its ability to serve customers in the region more efficiently. The investment will be in one or more tranches as per business requirement, with a proposed investment of up to USD$5,000/- and 100% subscription to the share capital. The WoS will be a related party of the Company and other subsidiaries once incorporated.

  • Glottis Limited is incorporating a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WoS) in Malaysia
  • The primary objective is to expand the Company’s operational reach and enhance its ability to serve customers in the region
  • The investment will be in one or more tranches as per business requirement
  • Proposed investment of up to USD$5,000/- with 100% subscription to the share capital
  • The WoS will be a related party of the Company and other subsidiaries once incorporated

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Glottis Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KOTIC] Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd Appoints Ms. Rafiq Ahmed Sulaiha Banu as Additional Non-Executive Non Independent Director
item.description:
Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd has appointed Ms. Rafiq Ahmed Sulaiha Banu as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive Non independent Director. The appointment is subject to the approval of shareholders through postal ballot. The Director being appointed is not debarred from holding the office of director by virtue of any SEBI order or any other such authority. Ms. Banu is currently pursuing a Bachelor of Commerce (Corporate Secretaryship) and has demonstrated a keen interest in corporate laws, governance, and business administration. She is related to Mr. Rafig Ahmed, Promoter, Managing Director and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company.

  • Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd appoints Ms. Rafiq Ahmed Sulaiha Banu as Additional Non-Executive Non Independent Director
  • Appointment is subject to the approval of shareholders through postal ballot
  • Ms. Banu is currently pursuing a Bachelor of Commerce (Corporate Secretaryship)
  • Ms. Banu has demonstrated a keen interest in corporate laws, governance, and business administration
  • Ms. Banu is related to Mr. Rafig Ahmed, Promoter, Managing Director and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOTHARI INDUSTRIAL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DCMSHRIRAM] DCM Shriram Ltd Receives ITAT Order for AY 2021-22 with No Material Impact on Profit and Loss
item.description:
DCM Shriram Ltd has received an order from the Income-tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT), New Delhi for the Assessment Year 2021-22. The ITAT has adjudicated on unwarranted additions made under section 143(1) dated 25th October 2022, which amounted to Rs.238.02 crores and had a tax effect of Rs.83.17 crores. These additions were previously adjudicated vide ITAT’s order dated 30th July, 2025 and have now been referred to the Assessing Officer for de novo adjudication in accordance with law. The company has stated that this order has no material impact on its profit and loss.

  • DCM Shriram Ltd receives ITAT order for AY 2021-22
  • Order has no material impact on the profit and loss of the company
  • Unwarranted additions made under section 143(1) adjudicated
  • Additions amount to Rs.238.02 crores with a tax effect of Rs.83.17 crores
  • Case referred to Assessing Officer for de novo adjudication

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KOTIC] Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd Appoints Ms. Rafiq Ahmed Sulaiha Banu as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director
item.description:
Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd has appointed Ms. Rafiq Ahmed Sulaiha Banu as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive Non-Independent Director. The appointment is subject to the approval of shareholders through postal ballot. The Director being appointed is not debarred from holding the office of director by virtue of any SEBI order or any other such authority. Ms. Banu is currently pursuing a Bachelor of Commerce (Corporate Secretaryship) and has demonstrated a keen interest in corporate laws, governance, and business administration. She is related to Mr. Rafig Ahmed, Promoter, Managing Director and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company.

  • Kothari Industrial Corporation Ltd appoints Ms. Rafiq Ahmed Sulaiha Banu as Additional Non-Executive Non-Independent Director
  • Appointment is subject to shareholders' approval through postal ballot
  • Ms. Banu is currently pursuing a Bachelor of Commerce (Corporate Secretaryship)

Company: KOTHARI INDUSTRIAL CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MOTHERSON] Samvardhana Motherson International Declares Interim Dividend of INR 0.35 per Share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has announced the fixation of March 27, 2026, as the record date for Interim dividend entitlement for the financial year 2025-26. The Board of Directors has approved the declaration of an Interim Dividend of INR 0.35 (Thirty Five Paisa only) per equity share for the financial year 2025-26. The record date for the purpose of payment of Interim Dividend is set as March 27, 2026. The Interim Dividend will be paid within the stipulated time in accordance with the applicable laws to the equity shareholders whose names appear in the Register of Members or in the records of the Depositories as beneficial owners in equity shares as on the Record Date.

  • Samvardhana Motherson International Limited declares an Interim Dividend of INR 0.35 per equity share for FY 2025-26.
  • The Record Date for Interim dividend entitlement is fixed as March 27, 2026.
  • The Interim Dividend will be paid within the stipulated time in accordance with the applicable laws.
  • The dividend payment is applicable to equity shareholders whose names appear in the Register of Members or in the records of the Depositories as beneficial owners in equity shares as on the Record Date.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd | Category: Dividend
